description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish releases that triggers on pull request opened, reopened, and synchronize events, and on push to branches matching [0-9].[0-9].x and tags matching *. The workflow consists of two jobs: create-release and pyinstaller-executable. The create-release job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, determines a tag based on the Git reference, deletes previous releases and tags if any, tags the release, and creates a new release. The pyinstaller-executable job depends on create-release, runs on multiple operating systems, caches pip and npm, sets up Python 3.10, builds the development environment and executable, zips the executable, publishes it to the release, and notifies collaborators with a pull request comment.
